ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123456 has been confirmed
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

Your order has been successfully placed.

Order ID: 123456

Items:
- Echo Dot (4th Gen) – $49.99
- Amazon Basics AA Batteries (10-pack) – $9.99

Estimated delivery: 3-5 business days.

If you have any questions or need to make changes to your order, please visit your account page or contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon!

Best regards,
Amazon.com Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Application Requires Immediate Verification
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! You have been selected as a finalist for the XYZ University Scholarship Program.

To claim your award, you must verify your personal information and provide the required documents within the next 48 hours.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process:
<URL>

Failure to comply will result in forfeiture of the scholarship. This is a mandatory step to secure your funding.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Office of Student Financial Aid
XYZ University
